scenario.title: Glass cup near table edge
scenario.context: A glass cup is placed very close to the edge of a table.
scenario.question: Is it safe to push the cup slightly to the right?
scenario.expected_risk: The cup may fall off the table.

initial_plan.action: Push the cup slightly to the right.
initial_plan.expected_outcome: The cup will remain stable on the table.

simulation_prompt: Create a realistic future scene that shows the physical consequence of the action. Context: A glass cup is placed very close to the edge of a table. Action: Push the cup slightly to the right. Focus on the most physically plausible result.

verification.observed_outcome: The cup appears to be falling off the table.
verification.reason: The simulated future contradicts the assumption that the cup remains stable.

revised_plan.revised_action: Do not push the cup to the right. Move it inward away from the edge.
